_comment: UTM source|medium -> exact SA 'Source' text, specific to Pro Outdoor. Values confirmed live against the actual SA dropdown 2026-07-04.

Left as-is (will error safely rather than silently pick something wrong) until confirmed what CPC clicks from Bing should map to.
